name: Scroll
description: Display-only custom scrollbar indicator. Renders a thumb at a given position and size within a track.

props.name: thumbSize
props.description: Thumb size as a percentage (0–100) of the track

props.name: thumbPosition
props.description: Thumb position as a percentage (0–100) along the track

states.rationale: Display-only indicator with minor hover opacity change. No interactive color states.

propertyMapping.note: Figma uses 'type'; code uses 'orientation' for consistency with Separator.

useWhen: Custom scrollbar appearance alongside hidden native scrollbars
Scroll position visualization in panels or lists
When native scrollbar styling is insufficient
doNotUseFor: Actual scroll behavior — use native overflow: auto
Navigation — use Tabs, Sidebar, or Pagination

knownDeviations.description: No L4 color tokens in tokens.json. Uses --dls-color-intent-neutral-base directly for thumb color.
Hover uses hardcoded opacity value (0.8) instead of a token.
